team.date_founded: Founded by the research outposts clustered around Enceladus's great geysers, a young and scrappy club.
team.number_of_fans: Around 11 million, small in number but explosive in voice.
team.badge: A white geyser bursting from blue ice toward a ringed sky.
team.home_kit: Pale ice-blue with white spray streaks rising from the hem.
team.away_kit: White with blue trim and a single erupting plume.
team.third_kit: Deep ocean teal flecked with frost-white.
team.history: Enceladus Geysers do one thing spectacularly: they erupt. A modest, youthful side with little money, they sit deep, absorb pressure, and then explode forward in sudden, devastating counters that have humbled far richer clubs.
team.club_culture: Patient then explosive, and proud of their underdog status. The Eruption love nothing more than ambushing a giant.
team.political_leaning: Frontier-independent, with the open-minded streak of a research colony.
trophy_cabinet: A reputation as everyone's least favourite away trip
legends: Vex Tarn — the counterattacking striker who scored the colony's most famous goal
achievements: Most goals scored on the counter in the league

stadium.date_built: A functional ground built beside the geyser fields.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the Enceladus research and water-harvest stations.
stadium.pitch_size: Standard, with deep space behind to launch the counter into.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for the moon's deep cold.
stadium.bio: The Spray is a tight, functional bowl where the small crowd erupts in unison with every breaking counter — a sudden roar that mirrors the geysers outside.

training_facility.date_built: A standard-grade complex run on a research-colony budget.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded modestly by the science stations.
training_facility.bio: The Geyser Training Grounds focus relentlessly on transition: the instant the ball is won, everyone explodes forward. It is counterattacking drilled to instinct.

manager.appearance: Sharp and quick, paces the technical area waiting for the moment to spring.
manager.bio: Crystal Murai turns poverty into a weapon — her Geysers defend deep and patiently, then erupt forward the instant they win the ball. She has built a side that punches far above its modest budget.
manager.personality: Patient, opportunistic, and fearless against bigger names.
manager.playing_history: A quick counterattacking forward who played her whole career at small clubs.
manager.playing_philosophy: Absorb, wait, erupt. Let them have the ball until the moment it costs them everything.
manager.culture: An underdog by birth who relishes humbling the rich.

managing_staff.appearance: Earnest and youthful, more at home with the academy kids than the seniors.
managing_staff.bio: Spra Iversen runs the youth pathway that keeps the cash-strapped Geysers stocked with eager, fast-breaking talent. The club's future is his charge.
managing_staff.playing_history: A modest winger turned youth developer.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Young legs win counters. Grow them, trust them, and let them run.
managing_staff.culture: The keeper of the colony's young talent.
achievements: Built a youth pipeline that sustains the senior side

players.appearance: Composed and alert, ready to start the counter.
players.bio: Plume Torres is the balanced keeper who launches the eruption, distributing fast and accurately the instant he claims the ball.
players.culture: The first spark of the counter.

players.appearance: Combative and quick, the bite on the flank.
players.bio: Vapor Cruz is the aggressive full-back who breaks forward like a released spring once the Geysers win the ball.
achievements: Most counterattacking runs by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the patient deep defender.
players.bio: Geyser Walsh is the team-first defender who absorbs pressure without panic, the patience before the eruption.

players.appearance: Veteran and tireless, the workhorse anchor.
players.bio: Steam Hayashi never stops covering, the relentless grafter who holds the deep block together.

players.appearance: Balanced and calm, reads the danger early.
players.bio: Jet Fischer is the composed defender who keeps the block disciplined and times the spring forward perfectly.

players.appearance: Inventive and quick-thinking, the brain of the break.
players.bio: Spray Morales is the creative spark who threads the killer pass the instant the counter erupts.

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, covers every blade.
players.bio: Brine Nakamura is the team-first runner who powers the transition from deep block to lightning break.
achievements: Most distance covered in the side

players.appearance: Balanced and tidy, the calm link in the break.
players.bio: Saline Park is the composed midfielder who keeps the counter under control instead of letting it spill into chaos.
achievements: Highest pass completion on the break

players.appearance: Lean and predatory, the tip of the eruption.
players.bio: Gush Li is the selfish finisher who lives for the half-chance the counter creates, lethal in space.

players.appearance: Fierce and direct, sparks the break from the front.
players.bio: Surge Patel is the aggressive forward who triggers the counter by hounding tired defenders into mistakes.
achievements: Most high turnovers won by a forward

players.appearance: Sharp and self-assured, a second finisher.
players.bio: Flood Novak is the selfish forward who doubles the threat on the break, hungry to outscore his strike partner.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Tide Brennan is the cautious veteran second keeper, a settling presence behind the first choice.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Ripple Tanaka is the team-first deputy who slots into the deep block without weakening it.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Drizzle Osei is the promising young defender Iversen is grooming, calm and quick to learn.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Current Webb is the creative deputy who can unlock a stubborn block, a youngster brimming with ideas.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Wave Koval is the eager young finisher pushing for a place, a selfish forward desperate to make the counter his own.
